title: Tender Crispy Syrian Lamb Pilaf
description: A traditional Syrian dish featuring tender lamb and crispy crust, cooked to perfection in a wood-fired oven with ghee, this recipe is a hearty and flavorful one-pot meal, earthy and satisfying, with a crispy texture from the wood-fired bake, making it a dash-friendly option for any occasion
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large oven-safe pot over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides
Add the basmati rice, allspice, cumin, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine
Add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to a preheated wood-fired oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the crust is crispy and golden brown
